title: C Values, Integer Conversions, and Size Arithmetic · Object-Lifetime Lens: Integer Ranges Ranks
summary: A binary record parser receives attacker-controlled counts that cross signedness and multiplication boundaries before allocation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem integer ranges ranks increment in checked size and conversion policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Select integer types from range, signedness, rank, width, and representation requirements rather than familiar spelling.
